variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

No clear non-lease short-term debt/current borrowings line is present. 'Lease liabilities' and 'Lease liabilites' are excluded by rule, and no other current borrowings/current portion of debt label appears in the balance sheet preview.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

variables.notes: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Only clear balance-sheet PPE-type asset line; under IFRS this is the reported net tangible fixed asset line and is preferable to cash flow capex lines or intangible assets.
Capex flow, not the balance-sheet stock of PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.
Intangible balancing line, not PPE.
Intangible capex flow, not PPE.

variables.notes: Chose label outside shortlist. 'Equipment' is the only clear balance-sheet property/plant/equipment-type line and represents net PPE better than cash-flow investment lines.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities line; preferred over before-working-capital subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working capital, not the final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the before-working-capital subtotal.
